front: What is the role of D-amino acid oxidase (DAAO) in the central nervous system?
back: DAAO oxidizes D-serine, an NMDA receptor co-agonist, to iminoglutarate. DAAO is enriched in astrocytes. Its activity modulates NMDA receptor signaling. DAAO inhibitors are being explored for schizophrenia treatment by increasing D-serine levels.
